race.comment: KAWATIRI (7) is going well enough to trouble these. Ran a nice race despite the fact that she just missed the frame last start when fifth over 1200m at Tamworth. Well placed today and is sure to take a ton of beating. ACOTANGO (10) finished out of the money two starts back, then he  launched late when fourth in a 1000m contest at Orange three weeks ago. Improver who will relish the good tempo. DAYU (13) has switched yards since finishing a dismal thirteenth over 1450m at Muswellbrook on January 13. Improver who goes into the exotics.
